creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Charles,

This seems to be a Ruby issue.  I had not noticed the issue so far, but I do have the same result as you when running facter without arguments.

As a workaround (depending on your usage) `facter --no-ruby` returns the expected facts.

Reverting the last commit to lang/ruby24 unbreaks facter:
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=475483
